channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Domeng Set to Intensify into Typhoon as It Approaches PH
item.description: Tropical Storm Domeng, currently in the Philippine Area of Responsibility, is projected to strengthen over the next 24 hours. PAGASA weather specialist Obet Badrina indicated that Domeng could reach s...

item.title: Alex Chinneck Creates Surreal Urban Sculptures for Dior Store Windows in New York and Beverly Hills
item.description: British sculptor Alex Chinneck has partnered with Dior to create a series of large-scale sculptural installations for the fashion house’s flagship stores in New York City and Beverly Hills. Known for ...

item.title: Gawad Kalinga founder Tony Meloto arrested in Bulacan on trafficking charges
item.description: According to ABS-CBN News, Tony Meloto, the founder of the social housing organization Gawad Kalinga, was arrested in Bulacan on charges related to qualified trafficking. The report, published on May ...

item.title: Journalist John Solomon reportedly considered for White House special government employee position
item.description: A report indicates that journalist John Solomon, known for his work on politically sensitive investigations involving the 2016 election and the Trump campaign, is being considered for a role within th...

item.title: Stella falls silent during conversation with Bea in 'The Alibi' Episode 53
item.description: Episode 53 of the ABS-CBN series ‘The Alibi’ focuses on a key interaction between the characters Stella and Bea, where an emotionally charged or tense conversation unfolds. Based on the episode headli...

item.title: Supreme Court mandates High Courts to deliver reserved judgments within three months
item.description: In a significant directive aimed at reducing judicial delays, the Supreme Court of India has instructed all High Courts to pronounce judgments within three months of reserving verdicts. The decision c...

item.title: Prioritising Preventative Healthcare for a Longer, Healthier Life
item.description: Dr Rakesh Mohanlall emphasises that good health is the truest form of wealth. While many people focus extensively on building financial stability, they often neglect preventative healthcare, which can...

item.title: Vice Ganda, Vhong Navarro, and Jhong Hilario share hilarious moments on 'It's Showtime'
item.description: On the popular noontime show 'It's Showtime,' hosts Vice Ganda, Vhong Navarro, and Jhong Hilario entertained audiences with their comedic banter, also known as 'bardagulan.' The segment featured witty...

item.title: NFHS-6 shows steady improvement in institutional deliveries and maternal care indicators in India
item.description: According to the National Family Health Survey-6 (NFHS-6), institutional deliveries in India have increased from 88.6 per cent in 2019-21 to 90.6 per cent in 2023-24, indicating gradual progress towar...

item.title: Emiru’s streaming journey, background, and relationships explained
item.description: Emiru, whose real name is Emily Beth Schunk, is an American Twitch streamer, YouTuber, and cosplayer who rose to fame through her League of Legends gameplay and creative cosplay content. Born on 3 Jan...

item.title: Barcelona Completes €80 Million Signing Of Anthony Gordon From Newcastle
item.description: Barcelona don finally secure the signing of English winger, Anthony Gordon, from Newcastle United in one deal wey fit reach €80 million. The club announce say the 25-year-old don sign five-year contra...

item.title: Tanzanian leaders and citizens attend funeral of Suzana Magufuli, mother of former President Magufuli
item.description: Vice-President Emmanuel Nchimbi traveled to Chato in the Geita region to lead mourners at the funeral of Suzana Magufuli, the mother of Tanzania’s late President John Pombe Magufuli. The event drew of...

item.title: Rescuers face extreme conditions in Laos cave operation after five men found alive
item.description: Rescuers in Laos are grappling with extremely challenging conditions after five men were discovered alive in a flooded cave in Xaysomboun province, more than a week after entering to mine for gold. Au...

item.title: A Comprehensive Guide to Angels and Their Roles According to the Bible
item.description: This article gives a detailed explanation of angels as described in the Bible, their names, and their specific duties. It draws on insights from Rev. Dr. Humphrey Waweru of Kenyatta University. Angels...

item.title: Tributes paid to 17-year-old who died swimming at Pickmere Lake during heatwave
item.description: A 17-year-old named David Tita Jr. died after getting into trouble while swimming at Pickmere Lake near Northwich during the UK heatwave. Cheshire Police confirmed the recovery of a teenage body from ...

item.title: Angat Dam Drops Below Operating Level Due to Drought; Public Encouraged to Conserve Water
item.description: The public is being called upon to conserve water as the Angat Dam in Bulacan has fallen below its normal operating level because of the ongoing drought conditions affecting parts of the Philippines. ...

item.title: Trump Endorses South Carolina Lieutenant Governor Pam Evette for Governor, Sidelines Other MAGA Candidates
item.description: President Donald Trump officially endorsed South Carolina Lieutenant Governor Pam Evette for the state's upcoming gubernatorial race, marking a significant moment in the crowded Republican field. Trum...

item.title: Federal Judge Blocks Kennedy Center Renaming After Legal Challenge to Board Decision
item.description: A federal judge has ordered the removal of President Donald Trump’s name from the Kennedy Center and halted efforts tied to a planned renovation and renaming of the institution. The decision was issue...

item.title: Adrian Higham’s career, health challenges, and life after leaving BBC’s The Bidding Room
item.description: Adrian Higham is an English antiques dealer and TV personality best known for appearing on BBC One’s show The Bidding Room. He gained popularity due to his strong bidding skills and lively personality...

item.title: Trump reviews proposed 60-day Iran ceasefire extension amid ongoing US-Iran negotiations
